name: Black Forest Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
Beat eggs, then add sugar, shortening, milk, and vanilla. Mix in flour and baking powder. Stir in chocolate chips. Pour batter into a greased large baking pan and drop cherry pie filling by the teaspoon into even rows.
Topping:
Blend Bisquick, sugar, butter or oleo until loose crumbs form. Sprinkle over top of cake and garnish with chocolate chips. Bake at 375°F for 50 minutes to 1 hour until golden brown.
